# clang trunk (x86-64): assertion "bitwidth too small" in IntegerType::get during codegen of va_arg on struct with flexible array member

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173907
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/dPebMGWej

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/lib/IR/Type.cpp:319: static llvm::IntegerType* llvm::IntegerType::get(llvm::LLVMContext&, unsigned int): Assertion `NumBits >= MIN_INT_BITS && "bitwidth too small"' failed.

```

## Code
```c
struct S {
  double i[];
};
void __attribute__((noinline)) testvacd(int n, ...) {
  int i;
  __builtin_va_list ap;
  __builtin_va_start(ap, n);
  for (i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    struct S t = __builtin_va_arg(ap, struct S);
    checkcd(t);
  }
  __builtin_va_end(ap);
}
int main() {
  testitcd();
  return 0;
}
```

## Code
```c
struct S {
  double i[];
};
void __attribute__((noinline)) testvacd(int n, ...) {
  int i;
  __builtin_va_list ap;
  __builtin_va_start(ap, n);
  for (i = 0; i &lt; n; i++) {
    struct S t = __builtin_va_arg(ap, struct S);
    checkcd(t);
  }
  __builtin_va_end(ap);
}
int main() {
  testitcd();
  return 0;
}
```
